name: TimerRuntime
description: Timer runtime tools for heartbeat and cron scheduling. Supports sub-session creation while binding job ownership to the parent session.

capabilities.name: create_timer_job
capabilities.description: Create a timer job. Use mode=heartbeat with interval_seconds for short polling, or mode=cron with cron_expr (5-field cron). Sub-sessions can create jobs; ownership is bound to parent session.

cron_expr.description: Required when mode=cron. Standard 5-field cron expression: minute hour day month weekday.

payload.description: Optional text payload injected on every timer tick.

deadline_seconds.description: Optional max runtime window in seconds.

max_runs.description: Optional max trigger count before auto-complete.

capabilities.name: list_timer_jobs
capabilities.description: List timer jobs. Main session lists all owned jobs; sub-session lists its own created jobs by default.

limit.description: Maximum number of rows to return (default 50).

include_all_owner_jobs.description: When true, include all jobs under owner session. Ignored for sub-sessions by default.

capabilities.name: get_timer_job_state
capabilities.description: Get one timer job by id.

capabilities.name: stop_timer_job
capabilities.description: Cancel one timer job by id.
